title: Summarizing Time Series Data with Seasonal Decomposition
scenario: Create a prompt to summarize a large time series dataset of weekly sales data with a strong seasonal component. The output should be a clear and concise markdown table with the following columns: 'Season', 'Mean', 'Std Dev', 'Max', 'Min'. The table should show the seasonal decomposition of the data for each quarter of the year. The prompt should include specific instructions for handling missing values and outliers.
constraints: Use markdown formatting for the table
Include specific instructions for handling missing values and outliers

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated markdown table meets the formatting and handling instructions.
Evaluate the accuracy of the seasonal decomposition for each quarter of the year.
Ensure the table contents accurately represent the original dataset.
